roundTimer._comment: Crop of the MM:SS digits inside the centre hexagon. Measured from a 1920x1080 screenshot. x/y is top-left; width/height should tightly contain only the digits, not the hex border. scale upscales before OCR - 3 works well for ~34px tall text. brightnessThreshold separates the white digits from the dark hex background.

roundScore._comment: Two score numbers sit either side of the timer hex - DEF (teal) on the left, ATK (red) on the right. Each is a single digit (0-13) in a small box. Same OCR pipeline as the timer but whitelist is digits only. scale 3 works well for ~34px tall text.
